shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find . -maxdepth 3 \( -path './node_modules' -o -path './.git' \) -prune -o -print | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -400
find node_modules/next/dist/docs -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^#/#' | sort | grep -Ei 'app|pages|router|api|route|document|error|not-found|loading|metadata|head' | head -200

find . -maxdepth 4 \( -path './node_modules' -o -path './.git' \) -prune -o -type f \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.tsx' -o -name '*.json' -o -name '*.css' \) -print | sort | xargs -I{} sh -c "echo '--- {}'; sed -n '1,220p' '{}'"

sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/03-layouts-and-pages.mdx && printf '
---DOC---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/10-error-handling.mdx && printf '
---DOC---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/15-route-handlers.mdx && printf '
---DOC---
' && sed -n '1,220p' node_modules/next/dist/docs/01-app/01-getting-started/14-metadata-and-og-images.mdx
